nasb.text: He also took some of the seed of the land and planted it in fertile soil. He placed it beside abundant waters; he set it like a willow.

esv.text: Then he took of the seed of the land and planted it in fertile soil. He placed it beside abundant waters. He set it like a willow twig,

cnv.text: 牠又把以色列地的種子取去，栽種在肥沃的地土、水流的旁邊，好像栽種柳樹一樣；

ccb.text: 它又把以色列的树苗像柳树一样栽在水源丰沛的沃土里。
